name: Idle Ants Simulator
description: Idle Ants Simulator is a casual online game for kids. In this game, hardworking ants are constantly moving food, such as donuts and cheese. ..Increase the number of ants, upgrade the level of ants, unlock new skins for ants, and decorate your own hut. There are more ways to play waiting for you to unlock! Come and play Idle Ants Simulator!
tags: Android, Animal, Boy, Food, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Online, Simulation, Skill
